Name: UWrapBox
Description:
Arranges widgets left-to-right.  When the widgets exceed the Width it will place widgets on the next line.
  
   Many Children
   Flows
   Wraps

Variables.Name: InnerSlotPadding
Variables.Description: The inner slot padding goes between slots sharing borders

Variables.Name: WrapWidth
Variables.Description: When this width is exceeded, elements will start appearing on the next line.

Variables.Name: bExplicitWrapWidth
Variables.Description: Use explicit wrap width whenever possible. It greatly simplifies layout calculations and reduces likelihood of "wiggling UI"

Functions.Name: SetInnerSlotPadding
Functions.Description: Sets the inner slot padding goes between slots sharing borders
